text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now let's see… Where could everyone 
be hiding this time?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mayano and Marvelous seem like they'd 
get tired of waiting to be found, sooo…

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I bet they're hiding in places where they can 
distract themselves, like the school store or 
the cafe!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll show you both just how great 
Tokai Teio is! Ready or not, here I come!♪
